label: Arb Stream
description: Live prediction market arb opportunities with decay bars, expected value, and one-click execute.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all grid widgets via widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2: requiredEntitlements: ['predictions-trading'] set. 0.3: availableOn: ['predictions'] set. 0.4: No any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5: Fixed — ARB_THRESHOLD_OPTIONS was imported from lib/mocks/fixtures/sports-fixtures; moved inline as a widget-local const. 0.6: isLoading guard added (context is synchronous/mock so always false; ready for wiring). 0.7: Empty state present — Card with Clock icon and 'No arbs above N% threshold' when activeArbs.length === 0. 0.8: error guard added. 0.9: No dead code.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass. 0.1: WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all grid widgets via widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2: requiredEntitlements: ['predictions-trading'] set. 0.3: availableOn: ['predictions'] set. 0.4: No any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5: Fixed — ARB_THRESHOLD_OPTIONS was imported from lib/mocks/fixtures/sports-fixtures; moved inline as a widget-local const. 0.6: isLoading guard added (context is synchronous/mock so always false; ready for wiring). 0.7: Empty state present — Card with Clock icon and 'No arbs above N% threshold' when activeArbs.length === 0. 0.8: error guard added. 0.9: No dead code.

1.1.note: Widget reads activeArbs, arbNewIds, arbThreshold, arbMarketTypeFilter, executeArb exclusively via usePredictionsData() — no inline fetch or direct import. 1.2: predictions-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() and derives scopeStrategyIds via getStrategyIdsForScope(). 1.3/1.5: Arb opportunities are market-level data (cross-venue, not strategy-scoped); scope filtering applies to positions, not arb stream. This is correct by domain design. 1.4: clientIds from globalScope not wired into predictions context — same open gap as other domains. 1.6: Empty scope arrays return all arbs (arb stream is unfiltered by scope). 1.7: ARB_THRESHOLD_OPTIONS was in lib/mocks/ (sports-fixtures.ts) — removed from mock file dependency; now defined inline in widget as a UI constant.

This is correct by domain design. 1.4: clientIds from globalScope not wired into predictions context — same open gap as other domains. 1.6: Empty scope arrays return all arbs (arb stream is unfiltered by scope). 1.7: ARB_THRESHOLD_OPTIONS was in lib/mocks/ (sports-fixtures.ts) — removed from mock file dependency; now defined inline in widget as a UI constant.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

findings.description: 0.5 — Widget imported ARB_THRESHOLD_OPTIONS from lib/mocks/fixtures/sports-fixtures.ts. Removed mock import; constant defined inline in widget file as a UI-only value.
0.6/0.8 — No loading or error guard. Added isLoading/error stubs following established DeFi context pattern.

1.7 — ARB_THRESHOLD_OPTIONS was shared between sports and predictions widgets via lib/mocks/fixtures/sports-fixtures.ts. Now each widget owns its own copy. If this constant needs sharing across domains, it should move to lib/config/ — deferred, not a widget-file concern.
